member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Absolute.IDocumentPageCollection`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Indexer to access pages by index
member.param: Page index

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Absolute.IDocumentPage`1.ObjectModel
member.summary: Object model for this page (text, images, paths, etc.)

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Absolute.IDocumentPageContainer`1
member.summary: Container of pages which may contain text

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Absolute.IDocumentPageContainer`1.Pages
member.summary: Read-only collection of all pages within this container

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IAbsolute
member.summary: Represents an object that can be positioned absolutely.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IAbsolute.BoundingBox
member.summary: The bounding box of the image.
member.remarks: Position and dimensions are represented in pts.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IDocumentObject
member.summary: General object found within a document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IDocumentObjectCollection`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the element at the specified index.
member.param: The zero-based index of the element to get.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IDocumentObjectProperty
member.summary: A property for a document object.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IParent`2
member.summary: An object that can contain children.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathSegmentTypes
member.summary: Type of path segment, determining how the path is drawn

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathSegmentTypes.LineTo
member.summary: Represents a component of a straight line

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathSegmentTypes.BezierTo
member.summary: Represents a component of a bezier curve

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathSegmentTypes.MoveTo
member.summary: Represents a jump to a new point

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathFillModes
member.summary: Fill mode, determines how portions are considered "inside" or "outside" of the path area

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathFillModes.Alternate
member.summary: Fills regions with an odd number of ray intersections.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.PathFillModes.Winding
member.summary: Fills regions which have a non-zero segment intersection count.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IPathSegment.Coordinate
member.summary: Coordinate associated with this path segment.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IPathSegment.IsClose
member.summary: True if this segment closes the path.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.IPathSegment.SeparateFromPrevious
member.summary: If the point previous to this one connects to it or not.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Ocr.IOcrEngine.Read(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentId)
member.summary: OCR the specified PDF document and return the result
member.param: Document to OCR

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentId.ReferenceType
member.summary: Pdf document identifier type (local or remote)

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentId.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new Pdf document identifier instance from a local document
member.param: Local identifier

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentId.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new Pdf document identifier instance from a remote document
member.param: Remote identifier

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentId.#ctor(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentId)
member.param: Identifier to copy

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentCharacter.LooseLeft
member.remarks: The entire vertical area any glyph of a font could occupy

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentCharacter.LooseRight
member.remarks: The entire vertical area any glyph of a font could occupy

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentCharacter.LooseTop
member.remarks: The entire vertical area any glyph of a font could occupy

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentCharacter.LooseBottom
member.remarks: The entire vertical area any glyph of a font could occupy

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentFontObject
member.summary: Font as it exists within a document

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentFontObject.IsEmbedded
member.summary: All font data is embedded within the document

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentImageFormats
member.summary: Commonly accepted image formats for all documents

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentImageFormats.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown format - may or may not be accepted

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.DocumentImageFormats.Bitmap
member.summary: Standard bitmap format with uncompressed pixel data

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentImageObject.Image
member.remarks: Modifiable

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentPageObjectModel`3
member.summary: Object model necessary to represent all contents on a given page

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentPageObjectModel`3.ImageObjects
member.summary: Image object collection for this page

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentPageObjectModel`3.PathObjects
member.summary: Path object collection for this page

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentPageObjectModel`3.TextObjects
member.summary: Text object collection for this page

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentPathObject.IsStroked
member.summary: True if the path is stroked

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.TextRenderModes.FillStroke
member.summary: Fill and stroke the text area

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.TextRenderModes.FillClip
member.summary: Fill the text area and clip

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.TextRenderModes.StrokeClip
member.summary: Stroke the text area and clip

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.TextRenderModes.FillStrokeClip
member.summary: Fill and stroke the text area and clip

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentTextObject.ContentStart
member.summary: Index of the first character (of this text object) into the complete text of the encapsulating container
member.remarks: Useful for ordering text objects and associating with individual character info

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentWithExtractableText
member.summary: Document with a number of pages which contain extractable text

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentWithExtractableText.PageCount
member.summary: Gets the number of pages in the PDF document.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentWithExtractableText.ExtractTextFromPage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Extracts the text content from one page of the PDF and returns it as a string.
member.param: Index of the page. Note: Page 1 has index 0...
member.returns: The text extracted from the PDF page as a string.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IDocumentWithExtractableText.ExtractTextFromPages(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Extracts the written text content from specified pages in the PDF PDF and returns it as a string. Pages will be separated by 4 consecutive Environment.NewLines
member.param: An IEnumerable list of page indexes.
member.returns: The text extracted from the PDF pages as a string.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IExtensibleRenderer.RenderHtmlAsPdfForExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Internal helper method for converting various document types to PDF via intermediate HTML
member.param: Html to convert

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IExtensibleRenderer.RenderHtmlAsPdfForExtensionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Internal helper method for asynchronously converting various document types to PDF via intermediate HTML
member.param: Html to convert

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IPageContainer
member.summary: Document page with physical dimensions and an identifying page index.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IBoundedPdfDocumentObject.ZOrder
member.summary: Determines whether the object is rendered in-front-of or behind existing content.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IBoundedPdfDocumentObject.ZPosition
member.summary: The z-position of the object in its relative z-order (Background, Foreground, NotSpecified). The higher the number, the farther on top the object is drawn.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IPdfDocumentObject
member.summary:
Document object
A unique and specific object existing within a document

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IPdfDocumentObject.ObjNum
member.remarks: Typically refers to a unique identifier but in some cases can refer to an index

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IPdfDocumentObject.PageIndex
member.summary: Index of the page which contains the object

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IPdfPathSegment
member.summary: A segment of a path for a PDF.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Pdf.IPdfPathSegment.Type
member.summary: The type of the path (MoveTo, LineTo, BezierTo).

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.RelativeZOrder
member.summary: Specifies the relative Z-order of an object.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.RelativeZOrder.Background
member.summary: Draw the object in the background of a document.
member.remarks: Objects are drawn behind both unspecified and foreground objects.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.RelativeZOrder.NotSpecified
member.remarks: Objects with this Z-order are drawn in-between background and foreground objects, in the order they are chosen to be drawn. Document text is usually marked as this.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.RelativeZOrder.Foreground
member.summary: Draw the object in the foreground of a document.
member.remarks: Objects are drawn in front of both unspecified and foreground objects.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentElementCollection`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Indexer to access pages by index
member.param: Page index

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentLayoutContainer`2
member.summary: Container of elements to experience layout

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentLayoutFriendly
member.summary: Attributes for assisting layout and positioning of an object within a laid out document

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentLayoutFriendly.AnchorOrigin
member.summary: Determines how the object's origin is transformed

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentLayoutFriendly.AnchorStyle
member.summary: Determines how the object is laid out within the document

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentParagraph.FirstLineIndentation
member.summary: Indentation of the first line, in inches

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentParagraph.SpacingAfter
member.summary: Spacing after this paragraph, in points

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentParagraph.SpacingBefore
member.summary: Spacing before this paragraph, in points

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.IDocumentParagraph.HorizontalContentAlignment
member.summary: Alignment of text within the paragraph

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorStyles
member.summary: Specifies anchor styles for determining how to transform the origin of an object

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorStyles.Unspecified
member.summary: Anchor style is unspecified - use the default for the target document type

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorStyles.Inline
member.summary: Flow the object in a matter consistent with the existing content

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorStyles.Floating
member.summary: Use an absolute position to place the object at a specific location

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorOrigins
member.summary: Specifies anchor origins for determining how to transform the origin of an object
member.remarks: Only applicable for `LayoutAnchorStyles.FloatOnContent`

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorOrigins.Page
member.summary: Anchor to the top-left corner of the page

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorOrigins.Margin
member.summary: Anchor to the top-left corner of the editable page area (excluding margins)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Relative.LayoutAnchorOrigins.Paragraph
member.summary: Anchor to the top-left corner of the current paragraph

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.VerticalAlignments
member.summary: Vertical alignment of an item within a parent container

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.VerticalAlignments.Top
member.summary: Align item to the top of the parent container (or bottom of previous child)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.VerticalAlignments.Center
member.summary: Align item to the vertical center of the parent container (adjacent to other children)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.VerticalAlignments.Bottom
member.summary: Align item to the bottom of the parent container (or top of previous child)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.VerticalAlignments.Stretch
member.summary: Stretch item vertically to fill the parent container (shared between other children)

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.HorizontalAlignments
member.summary: Horizontal alignment of an item within a parent container

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.HorizontalAlignments.Left
member.summary: Align item to the left of the parent container (or right of previous child)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.HorizontalAlignments.Center
member.summary: Align item to the horizontal center of the parent container (adjacent to other children)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.HorizontalAlignments.Right
member.summary: Align item to the right of the parent container (or left of previous child)

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Styling.HorizontalAlignments.Stretch
member.summary: Stretch item horizontally to fill the parent container (shared between other children)

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.BreakValue
member.summary: Values for breaks in a Word document.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ElementStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a content element.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ElementStatus.NoChange
member.summary: The element has not been changed since it was created.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalAlignment
member.summary: The possible horizontal alignment options for text and other elements.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalAlignment.Left
member.summary: The text or element will be aligned to the left side of its container.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalAlignment.Center
member.summary: The text or element will be horizontally centered within its container.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalAlignment.Right
member.summary: The text or element will be aligned to the right side of its container.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin
member.summary: The part of the document where the relative horizontal position of an object originates from.
member.remarks: Corresponds to the HorizontalRelativePositionValues of OpenXML.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.Margin
member.summary: Relative horizontal origin is the margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.Page
member.summary: Relative horizontal origin is the top-left of the page.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.Column
member.summary: Relative horizontal origin is the column the object is contained in.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.Character
member.summary: Relative horizontal origin is the run content.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.LeftMargin
member.summary: Relative horizontal origin is the document's left margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.RightMargin
member.summary: Relative horizontal origin is the document's right margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.InsideMargin
member.summary: Relative origin is the document's inside margin (left margin on odd pages, right margin on even).

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.OutsideMargin
member.summary: Relative origin is the document's outside margin (right margin on odd pages, left margin on even).

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin.NotSpecified
member.summary: Relative origin is not specified for this object.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues
member.summary: Represents the justification options for text within a table cell. Justification affects the horizontal spacing of the text within the cell.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.Left
member.summary: Aligns the text to the left of the cell.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.Start
member.summary: Aligns the text to the start of the cell (Left for Left-to-Right, Right for Right-to-Left).

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.Center
member.summary: Aligns the text to the center of the cell.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.Right
member.summary: Aligns the text to the right of the cell.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.End
member.summary: Aligns the text to the end of the cell (Right for Left-to-Right, Left for Right-to-Left).

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.Both
member.summary: Justifies the text on both sides of the cell, expanding the spacing between words as needed.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.MediumKashida
member.summary: Justifies the text with medium Kashida spacing, a specific form of letter spacing used in Arabic and other languages with similar writing systems.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.Distribute
member.summary: Distributes the text evenly across the cell, with equal spacing between all characters.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.NumTab
member.summary: Justifies the text with a specific number of tabs inserted between words, as defined by the NumTab property.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.HighKashida
member.summary: Justifies the text with high Kashida spacing, another form of letter spacing used in Arabic and other languages with similar writing systems.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.LowKashida
member.summary: Justifies the text with low Kashida spacing, another form of letter spacing used in Arabic and other languages with similar writing systems.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.JustificationValues.ThaiDistribute
member.summary: Justifies the text with Thai Distribute spacing, a specific form of letter spacing used in the Thai language.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShadingPatternValues.ThinReverseDiagonalStripe
member.summary: Thin reverse diagonal stripe shading pattern.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType
member.summary: Represents the various types of shapes.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.Round2SameRectangle
member.summary: Two Same-side Round Corner Rectangle Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.Round2DiagonalRectangle
member.summary: Two Diagonal Round Corner Rectangle Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.SnipRoundRectangle
member.summary: One Snip One Round Corner Rectangle Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.Snip2SameRectangle
member.summary: Two Same-side Snip Corner Rectangle Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.Snip2DiagonalRectangle
member.summary: Two Diagonal Snip Corner Rectangle Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.AccentBorderCallout1
member.summary: Callout 1 with Border and Accent Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.AccentBorderCallout2
member.summary: Callout 2 with Border and Accent Shape.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ShapeType.AccentBorderCallout3
member.summary: Callout 3 with Border and Accent Shape.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.StyleType
member.summary: The type of style a base style represents.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextAlignment
member.summary: Specifies the text alignment for the text.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextAlignment.Left
member.summary: The text is aligned to the left margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextAlignment.Center
member.summary: The text is centered horizontally within its container.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextAlignment.Right
member.summary: The text is aligned to the right margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextAlignment.Justified
member.summary: The text is justified, meaning the spaces between words are adjusted to create clean, even margins on both the left and right sides of the text.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSide
member.summary: Specifies which side of an object the text should wrap around.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSide.Largest
member.summary: Wrap around the largest of the two sides.
member.remarks: If object is centered, the text wraps around the side where it's first encountered.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Dk1
member.summary:
Dark 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "dk1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Dark1
member.summary:
Dark 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "dark1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Lt1
member.summary:
Light 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "lt1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Light1
member.summary:
Light 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "light1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Dk2
member.summary:
Dark 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "dk2".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Dark2
member.summary:
Dark 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "dark2".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Lt2
member.summary:
Light 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "lt2".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Light2
member.summary:
Light 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "light2".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Accent1
member.summary:
Accent 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "accent1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Accent2
member.summary:
Accent 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "accent2".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Accent3
member.summary:
Accent 3 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "accent3".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Accent4
member.summary:
Accent 4 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "accent4".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Accent5
member.summary:
Accent 5 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "accent5".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Accent6
member.summary:
Accent 6 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "accent6".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Hyperlink
member.summary:
Hyperlink Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "hyperlink".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.FollowedHyperlink
member.summary:
Followed Hyperlink Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "followedHyperlink".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.None
member.summary:
No Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "none".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Background1
member.summary:
Background 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "background1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Text1
member.summary:
Text 1 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "text1".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Background2
member.summary:
Background 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "background2".

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ThemeColorValues.Text2
member.summary:
Text 2 Theme Color.
When the item is serialized out as xml, its value is "text2".

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlign
member.summary: Represents the vertical alignment of text within a table cell.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlign.Top
member.summary: Aligns the text to the top of the cell.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlign.Middle
member.summary: Aligns the text to the middle of the cell vertically.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlign.Bottom
member.summary: Aligns the text to the bottom of the cell.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlignment
member.summary: The possible vertical alignment options for text and other elements.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlignment.Top
member.summary: The text or element will be aligned to the top of its container.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlignment.Middle
member.summary: The text or element will be vertically centered within its container.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalAlignment.Bottom
member.summary: The text or element will be aligned to the bottom of its container.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin
member.summary: The part of the document where the relative vertical position of an object originates from.
member.remarks: Corresponds to the VerticalRelativePositionValues of OpenXML.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.Margin
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the document's margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.Page
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the top-left of the document page.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.Paragraph
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the top-left of the paragraph this object is contained in.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.Line
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the line that contains the object.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.TopMargin
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the document's top margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.BottomMargin
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the document's bottom margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.InsideMargin
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the document's inside margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.OutsideMargin
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is the document's outside margin.

member.name: F:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin.NotSpecified
member.summary: Relative vertical origin is not specified.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IBreak
member.summary: Represents a page break within a Word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IBreak.Type
member.summary: The type of break (page, column, or line).

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IColor.ColorValue
member.summary: Value of the color in string form.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection
member.summary: Represents a section within a word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection.Width
member.summary: Width of the document section in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection.Height
member.summary: Height of the document section in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection.LeftMargin
member.summary: Left margin of the document section in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection.RightMargin
member.summary: Right margin of the document section in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection.TopMargin
member.summary: Top margin of the document section in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDocumentSection.BottomMargin
member.summary: Bottom margin of the document section in points.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IFont
member.summary: A font in a Word document.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IImage
member.summary: Represents an image object within a word document.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraph
member.summary: Represents a paragraph within a word document

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraph.FirstLineIndentation
member.summary: The indentation for the first line of a paragraph in inches.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraph.Alignment
member.summary: The alignment of the text in the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraph.LineSpacing
member.summary: The spacing of lines within the paragraph and between other paragraphs.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraph.DefaultFontSize
member.summary: The default size of the font in points.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IRun
member.summary: Represents a run within a word document

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IRun.IsBold
member.summary: Whether the contents in the run are bold or not.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IRun.IsItalic
member.summary: Whether the contents in the run are italic or not.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IRun.FontName
member.summary: The name of the font of the text contents.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IRun.FontSize
member.summary: The size of the font in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IShading.Fill
member.summary: Color for the fill in the shading.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IShape
member.summary: Represents a shape within a word document.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITable
member.summary: Represents a table within a word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITable.Rows
member.summary: All the rows in the table.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITable.Width
member.summary: The preferred width of the table.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell
member.summary: Represents a table cell within a word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.Width
member.summary: The width of the table cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.TopMargin
member.summary: Top margin of the table cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.BottomMargin
member.summary: Bottom margin of the table cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.LeftMargin
member.summary: Left margin of the table cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.RightMargin
member.summary: Right margin of the table cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.GridSpan
member.summary: The grid span of the table cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.TextAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal alignment of the text content within the cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.VerticalAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical alignment of the content within the cell.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.InsertCellBeforeSelf(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell)
member.summary: Inserts a new TableCell before this cell within the parent row.
member.param: The TableCell object to be inserted before this cell.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.InsertCellAfterSelf(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell)
member.summary: Inserts a new TableCell after this cell within the parent row.
member.param: The TableCell object to be inserted after this cell.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCell.Split(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits a cell in the table into multiple rows and columns.
member.param: The number of the row for the split.
The number of columns for the split.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow
member.summary: Represents a table row within a word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow.Cells
member.summary: All the cells in this table row.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow.Item(System.Int32)
member.param: Index of the row.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow.InsertRowAfterSelf(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow)
member.summary: Inserts a new table row after this row within the parent table.
member.param: The table row object to be inserted after this row.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow.InsertRowAfterSelf
member.summary: Inserts a new table row after this row within the parent table.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow.InsertRowBeforeSelf(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow)
member.summary: Inserts a new table row before this row within the parent table.
member.param: The table row object to be inserted after this row.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRow.InsertRowBeforeSelf
member.summary: Inserts a new table row before this row within the parent table.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IText
member.summary: Represents a text object within a word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IText.FontSize
member.summary: The size of the font, measured in points.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IText.FontStyle
member.summary: The style of the font (bold, italic, etc.)

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextWrapBehavior
member.summary: How the text should wrap around an object in a Word document.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordAbsolute
member.summary: An object in a Word document that can be absolutely positioned.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordAbsolute.HorizontalRelativePositionOrigin
member.summary: The origin of the shape's relative horizontal position.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordAbsolute.VerticalRelativePositionOrigin
member.summary: The origin of the shape's relative vertical position.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordAbsolute.ZOrder
member.summary: The Z-order in which the shape is rendered.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordAbsolute.ZPosition
member.summary: The z-position of the object in its relative z-order (Background, Foreground, NotSpecified). The higher the number, the farther on top the object is drawn.
member.remarks: This number is only compared with that of other objects with the same relative z-order.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordAbsolute.TextWrapBehavior
member.summary: How text should wrap around this object.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObject
member.summary: An object found within a word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObject.Status
member.summary: The status of the document object.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObject.Replace(IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObject)
member.summary: Replace this document object with another.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObjectCollection.First
member.summary: The first object in the document object collection.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObjectCollection.Last
member.summary: The last object in the document object collection.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IWordDocumentObjectProperty
member.summary: A property for a Word document object.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IBaseStyle
member.remarks: Corresponds to "w:style" objects in OpenXML.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IBaseStyle.StyleType
member.summary: The type of style this base style represents.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IBaseStyle.NextParagraphStyle
member.summary: The name of the style to be applied to the next paragraph.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IDerivedStyle
member.summary: Represents a style for an individual object in a Word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.LineSpacing
member.summary: The spacing between lines within the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.AdjustRightIndent
member.summary: Indicates whether to adjust the right indent of the paragraph automatically or not.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.AutoSpaceLatinAndEast
member.summary: Indicates whether to automatically adjust spacing between Latin characters and East Asian characters.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.AutoSpaceEastAndNumbers
member.summary: Indicates whether to automatically adjust spacing between East Asian characters and numbers.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.RightToLeft
member.summary: Indicates whether the text in the paragraph is right-to-left.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.ContextualSpacing
member.summary: Indicates whether to enable contextual spacing for the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.Justification
member.summary: The justification alignment of the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.TextAlignment
member.summary: The vertical text alignment of the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.KeepLinesOnPage
member.summary: Indicates whether to keep all lines of the paragraph on the same page.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.KeepWithNextParagraph
member.summary: Indicates whether to keep the paragraph with the next paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.Kinsoku
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply kinsoku rules for the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.MirrorIndents
member.summary: Indicates whether to mirror the paragraph indents when the text direction is changed.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.OverflowPunctuation
member.summary: Indicates whether to allow overflow punctuation for the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.PageBreakBefore
member.summary: Indicates whether to insert a page break before the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.WordWrap
member.summary: Indicates whether to enable word wrap for the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IParagraphStyle.OutlineLevel
member.summary: The outline level for the paragraph.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.IStyle
member.summary: Represents a style for an object in a Word document.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCellStyle.TopMargin
member.summary: The top margin of the cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCellStyle.BottomMargin
member.summary: The bottom margin of the cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCellStyle.LeftMargin
member.summary: The left margin of the cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableCellStyle.RightMargin
member.summary: The right margin of the cell.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableRowStyle.Height
member.summary: The height of the table row.
member.remarks: If this value is null, the row will be automatically resized to fit its content.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableStyle.Justification
member.summary: Gets or sets the justification of the table.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableStyle.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the preferred width of the table.
member.remarks: Stored in twips by default.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableStyle.LeftCellMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin between the left cell border and the cell contents.
member.remarks: Stored in twips by default.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableStyle.RightCellMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin between the right cell border and the cell contents.
member.remarks: Stored in twips by default.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableStyle.TopCellMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin between the top cell border and the cell contents.
member.remarks: Stored in twips by default.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITableStyle.BottomCellMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the margin between the bottom cell border and the cell contents.
member.remarks: Stored in twips by default.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Caps
member.summary: Indicates whether to display all characters in capital letters.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.CharacterScale
member.summary: The horizontal scaling percentage applied to the characters.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Emboss
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply an embossed effect to the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Imprint
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply an imprinted (engraved) effect to the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.IsBold
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply bold formatting to the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.IsItalic
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply italic formatting to the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Languages
member.summary: The language settings for the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.NoProof
member.summary: Indicates whether to exclude the text from spelling and grammar checking.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Outline
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply an outline effect to the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Shadow
member.summary: Indicates whether to apply a shadow effect to the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.SmallCaps
member.summary: Indicates whether to format the text in small capital letters.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.SnapToGrid
member.summary: Indicates whether to snap the text to the document grid.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Spacing
member.summary: The spacing between characters in twentieths of a point.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.SpecVanish
member.summary: Indicates whether to hide the text when displaying simplified document content.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.Vanish
member.summary: Indicates whether to hide the text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.VerticalPosition
member.summary: The vertical position offset for superscript or subscript text.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.WebHidden
member.summary: Indicates whether to hide the text when the document is displayed as a web page.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.ITextStyle.FontSizeComplexScript
member.summary: The size of the font for complex script.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacingRules
member.summary: Various ways to configure vertical line spacing

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing
member.summary: Represents the spacing between lines in a paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.EnableAutoSpacingAfterParagraph
member.summary: Enable automatic spacing is applied after the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.EnableAutoSpacingBeforeParagraph
member.summary: Enable automatic spacing is applied before the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.LinesAfterParagraph
member.summary: Spacing after the paragraph, in number of lines.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.LinesBeforeParagraph
member.summary: Spacing before the paragraph, in number of lines.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.LineSpacingRule
member.summary: Rule for line spacing in the paragraph.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.SpacingAfterParagraph
member.summary: Spacing after the paragraph, in twentieths of a point.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.SpacingBeforeParagraph
member.summary: Spacing before the paragraph, in twentieths of a point.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.LineSpacing.SpacingBetweenLines
member.summary: Spacing between the lines of the paragraph from the base of the font on one line to the next.
member.remarks: Line height would generally be the font size in points. This value is divided over 240 to give the multiplicative factor that is multiplied by the line height for spacing.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapNone
member.summary: Text should not wrap around a drawing.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare
member.summary: Text should wrap around a drawing in a rectangular manner.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare.DistanceFromLeft
member.summary: Distance between text and left edge of the drawing.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare.DistanceFromRight
member.summary: Distance between text and the right edge of the drawing.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare.DistanceFromTop
member.summary: Distance between text and the top edge of the drawing.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare.DistanceFromBottom
member.summary: Distance between text and the bottom edge of the drawing.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare.TextWrapSide
member.summary: Which side of the object the text should wrap around.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSquare.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapSide)
member.param: Distance between text and the left edge of the drawing.
Distance between text and the right edge of the drawing.
Distance between text and the top edge of the drawing.
Distance between text and the bottom edge of the drawing.
Which sides of the drawing the wrap should apply to.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapTopAndBottom
member.summary: Text should wrap around the object on the top and bottom, but not the sides.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapTopAndBottom.DistanceFromTop
member.summary: Distance from the top edge of the object to text.
member.remarks: Represented in English Metric Units.

member.name: P:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapTopAndBottom.DistanceFromBottom
member.summary: Distance from the bottom edge of the object to text.
member.remarks: Represented in English Metric Units.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Word.TextWrapTopAndBottom.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.param: Distance from the top edge of the object to text, in English Metric Units.
Distance from the bottom edge of the object to text, in English Metric Units.

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Zip.IFileArchive.Extract(System.String)
member.summary: Extract all files to the specified path
member.param: Path to extract files to

member.name: M:IronSoftware.Abstractions.Zip.IFileArchive.GetBytes
member.summary: Retrieve binary data for the current archive

member.name: T:IronSoftware.IMatrixStruct
member.summary: Simple 6 component matrix (3x2) for object transformation.

member.name: T:IronSoftware.MatrixStruct
member.summary: Simple 6 component matrix (3x2) for object transformation.
